case_title: RIO PROPERTIES INC., VS. PHILIP A. ROUAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JAMES A. STEARMAN RE: INTEREST ON S/S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIO PROPERTIES INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS RIO ALL-SUITE HOTEL  AND CASINO, AND DOING BUSINESS AS RIO SUITE HOTEL & CASINO

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; DEFAULT JUDGMENT; EXEMPLIFICATION CERTIFICATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIO PROPERTIES INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS RIO ALL-SUITE HOTEL  AND CASINO, AND DOING BUSINESS AS RIO SUITE HOTEL & CASINO SERVED JUL-09-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROUAS, PHILIP A. ALSO KNOWN AS PHILLIP ROUAS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIO PROPERTIES INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS RIO ALL-SUITE HOTEL  AND CASINO, AND DOING BUSINESS AS RIO SUITE HOTEL & CASINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUAS, PHILIP A. ALSO KNOWN AS PHILLIP ROUAS $345,307.81 PRINCIPAL, $27,070.15 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $372,827.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIO PROPERTIES INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION DOING BUSINESS AS RIO ALL-SUITE HOTEL  AND CASINO, AND DOING BUSINESS AS RIO SUITE HOTEL & CASINO AS TO DEFENDANT ROUAS, PHILIP A. ALSO KNOWN AS PHILLIP ROUAS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
